metadata.section_title: 热变形过程中动态再结晶驱动晶粒细化的多尺度机理

records.title: A polycrystal plasticity-cellular automaton integrated modeling method for continuous dynamic recrystallization and its application to AA2196 alloy
records.abstract: Continuous dynamic recrystallization in hot-worked aluminum alloys is simulated by coupling 3D cellular automaton and visco-plastic self-consistent models.

paper_card.primary_claim: CDRX 可由位错累积/回复、亚晶形成与旋转、储能和曲率驱动的界面迁移共同解释。
usable_for: 晶体塑性-CA 多尺度建模
not_usable_for: AA2195 应力状态实验的直接结论

records.title: Effect of stress state on flow stress and grain refinement mechanisms during AA2195 hot deformation
records.abstract: Plane strain compression, uniaxial compression and torsion tests reveal stress-state-dependent grain fragmentation and subgrain rotation mechanisms in AA2195.

paper_card.primary_claim: 应力状态改变低角度晶界形成方向、三叉晶界连接和亚晶旋转激活温度，从而改变晶粒细化机制。
usable_for: 应力状态对晶粒细化机制的影响
not_usable_for: 镍基合金 DDRX 连续场模型验证

records.title: A continuum-field-enabled multiscale framework coupling crystal plasticity and cellular automaton for discontinuous dynamic recrystallization: Application to a nickel-based superalloy
records.abstract: A continuum-field-enabled CPFE-CA framework models DDRX nucleation and grain boundary migration through transformation fraction and bidirectional mapping.

paper_card.primary_claim: 用连续转变分数替代 CA 离散状态跳变，可缓解 CPFE-CA 耦合中的非物理应力突跳并保持微观组织-力学响应一致。
usable_for: 形核和晶界迁移软化机制
not_usable_for: 铝合金 CDRX 特定滑移系结论
